name: Maple Baked Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge chicken pieces in flour seasoned with salt and pepper.
2. In a heavy, flameproof casserole, heat butter until bubbling.
3. Brown the chicken pieces.
4. Pour maple syrup over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle with savory, thyme, and sage.
6. Arrange onion slices on top of the chicken pieces.
7. Pour water into the bottom of the casserole.
8. Bake, uncovered in a 350°F oven for 50 to 60 minutes or until tender, basting occasionally with pan juices.
